meta.title: BAZAAR
meta.description: Reliable inventory management for daily work.

meta.title: BAZAAR | Platform for retail teams
meta.description: Products, purchasing, sales, and reporting in one system for everyday store work.

hero.title: Manage products, purchasing, and sales in one place.
hero.subtitle: BAZAAR helps teams move faster, keep stock under control, and make decisions from reports.
hero.trust: Built for owners, managers, buyers, and store teams.

preview.title: Why teams choose BAZAAR
preview.item1: Reduce manual work and mistakes in daily operations.
preview.item2: Connect product accounting, purchasing, and sales in one workflow.
preview.item3: Get clear reports quickly for business control.

operations.label: Operations
operations.title: Daily work without chaos
operations.description: Bring core store processes into one interface instead of scattered spreadsheets and chats.
operations.point1: Clear operating structure for the team
operations.point2: One workflow for products and purchasing
operations.point3: Less manual work and fewer repeated tasks

sales.label: Sales
sales.title: Sales
sales.description: From register activity to shift results and management reporting, keep the trading day visible.
sales.point1: A complete view of sales and activity
sales.point3: A reliable base for daily decisions

visibility.label: Visibility
visibility.title: Clear control for managers
visibility.description: See what is happening across the business: where growth is strong and where action is needed.

features.title: All core retail workflows in one platform
features.subtitle: No scattered spreadsheets, no switching between disconnected systems.

inventory.title: Accurate inventory
inventory.description: Track stock, movements, and stock counts across stores.

workflows.description: Run supplier orders from creation through receiving.

rbac.title: Team roles
rbac.description: Separate access and responsibility across employees.

stores.description: Keep standards and settings consistent for every location.

exports.title: Imports and exports

visibility.description: Watch sales dynamics and operational indicators as they change.

modules.title: How BAZAAR supports the business
modules.subtitle: Three value areas your team uses every day.

operations.title: Operations and stock
operations.description: Daily product accounting and stock control.

sales.title: Sales and reports
sales.description: Tools for register work and management control.

platform.title: Platform and administration
platform.description: Settings, documents, and stable operating support.

security.title: Security and reliability
security.opsItem1: Service health and key metric monitoring.
security.opsItem3: Support for imports, exports, and document generation.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Short answers before you get started.

q1.question: Which interface languages are available?
q1.answer: RU, KG, and EN are available.

q2.question: Who is the platform for?
q2.answer: For owners, managers, buyers, and retail store teams.

q3.question: Can I import and export data?
q3.answer: Yes. BAZAAR supports data imports and exports in common working formats.

q4.question: Does it support documents?
q4.answer: Yes. The system can generate the working documents your team needs.

q5.question: Can I manage employee permissions?
q5.answer: Yes. The platform supports roles and access boundaries.

q6.question: Is it hard to start?
q6.answer: No. You can launch the basic workflows quickly and expand usage step by step.

finalCta.title: Ready to bring order to daily operations?
finalCta.subtitle: Start working in BAZAAR and connect your core processes in one system.

ios.title: Install Bazaar on iPhone or iPad
ios.subtitle: Safari installs Bazaar from the Share menu.

steps.confirm: Tap Add, then open Bazaar from the Home Screen.

safari.title: Install Bazaar from Safari
safari.subtitle: Safari can add Bazaar as an app.

steps.openShare: Use the Share button, or the File menu on Mac.
steps.add: On iPhone or iPad choose Add to Home Screen. On Mac choose Add to Dock.
steps.confirm: Confirm Add, then open Bazaar from the Home Screen or Dock.

unsupported.title: Open Bazaar in a supported browser
unsupported.subtitle: This browser cannot install the web app directly.
unsupported.body: Open Bazaar in Chrome on Android or desktop, or Safari on iPhone and iPad, then use Install app or Add to Home Screen.
unsupported.httpsRequired: Production installation requires HTTPS. Localhost is allowed for testing.

browser.title: Install Bazaar from your browser
browser.subtitle: Your browser will show the install prompt when the app is ready.
browser.body: If no prompt appears, use the browser menu and choose Install app. On iPhone or iPad, open Safari and use Add to Home Screen.
